queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between no checking account status and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the mitigating effect of negative checking account balances on credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the correlation between critical credit history and decreased likelihood of default.
